title: palicourea egensis subsp. egensis
intro: Palicourea egensis subsp. egensis, also known as the "Brazilian Uricosuric," is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and uricosuric effects. The health benefits associated with Palicourea egensis subsp. egensis include its potential to reduce uric acid levels, alleviate gout symptoms, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Palicourea egensis subsp. egensis are often made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
